==Parameters== ''Unnamed parameter #1'' The timezone abberation {{para|short}} Shortens the weekday ({{dow|short=yes}}) ==Examples== {{dow|m+|short=yes}} {{dow|m+|short=yes}} {{dow|IDLE}} {{dow|IDLE}} {{dow|JST}} {{dow|JST}} {{dow|CST|short=yes}} {{dow|CST|short=yes}} {{dow|IST}} {{dow|IST}} {{dow|UTC}} {{dow|UTC}} {{dow}} {{dow}} {{dow|short=yes}} {{dow|short=yes}} {{dow|EST|short=yes}} {{dow|EST|short=yes}} {{dow|MST}} {{dow|MST}} {{dow|HAST}} {{dow|HAST} {{dow|HAST|short=yes}} {{dow|HAST|short=yes}} {{dow|IDLW}} {{dow|IDLW}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=DAYOFWEEK%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
